My proof.
First of all define some didactic grammar:
A generic learning algorithm
learningData:=(input target)
modelParameters := { parameters of a model }
learningAlgo(learningData, Training TrainValidation TestFinal, modelParameters) := -> (trainedModel(T), metrics_M(wrt Validation), metrics_T (wrt TestFinal))
(CV: wrt may be a computation underlying many subsets of the validation dataset).

LearningFrenchAlgo:={
	learningData(.) (x,t)
	Validation (.Xvalidation), FinalTest(.Xtest)
	Set(.parameters)
	Targets (.targets)
	Représentation (.representer)
	Perfm (.PN) (.PM) (.PC) (.LID) (. Metric) (.testRecord), (.identifier), (. fctTrans=
			 (=liste(("std" (=objet "meanNormalization"))
				("sup" (=objet "SVM"))
				("
